ohtani.title: William Contreras recaps homer, win against Dodgers
ohtani.blurb: William Contreras talks about his home run against the Dodgers and more in the Brewers' series-opener win

imanaga.title: Yelich, Bauers combine for six RBI's in Brewers' win
imanaga.blurb: Christian Yelich and Jake Bauers each homer and combine for six RBI's, powering the Brewers to a 9-3 win

suzuki.title: Vázquez, Arrighetti lead Astros to 4-2 win
suzuki.blurb: Christian Vázquez drives a home run and Spencer Arrighetti pitches five scoreless innings to lead the Astros to a 4-2 win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Austin Martin hits the go-ahead homer in Twins' win
yoshida.blurb: Austin Martin hits a go-ahead home run in the Twins' 8-6 comeback victory over the Red Sox

okamoto.title: John Schneider recaps Gausman's start, Blue Jays win
okamoto.blurb: John Schneider praises Kevin Gausman's strong start and recaps the overall Blue Jays' win against the Pirates

murakami.title: Nine-run inning powers White Sox to win over Giants
murakami.blurb: Munetaka Murakami's bases-clearing double leads the White Sox to a nine-run 4th inning, to propel them to a 9-4 win over the Giants

matsui.title: Ohtani's homer, four Ks propel Dodgers to 4-0 win
matsui.blurb: A gem by Shohei Ohtani, both at the plate with a home run, and on the mound secures a 4-0 shutout victory for the Dodgers over the Padres
